message:
fix(tui): ensure base schema on TUI sync connections and refactor screen rendering

TUI startup race fix (lib.rs):
- Add ensure_base_schema_on_sync_connection() which runs idempotent CREATE
  TABLE IF NOT EXISTS DDL when a sync connection doesn't yet see core
  tables — fixing the startup race where TUI observability connections
  bypass the pool's init gate and query tables that don't exist yet
- Add fast-path probe (SELECT 1 FROM messages LIMIT 0) to skip DDL when
  the schema is already present

TUI screen refactoring:
- agents.rs: refactor agent list rendering with improved column alignment,
  status badge coloring, and activity timestamp formatting
- messages.rs: refactor message list rendering with improved truncation
  for long message bodies and consistent timestamp formatting
- projects.rs: refactor project list rendering with improved path display
  and agent count badges
- threads.rs: refactor thread view rendering with improved subject line
  wrapping and participant count display

Cargo.lock: dependency resolution updates from upstream crate bumps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 fn parse_recovered_created_at(row: &mcp_agent_mail_db::sqlmodel::Row) -> i64 {
